intro_highlights.text: Right: Unsupervised depth pre-training with Gaussian splatting leads to reduced depth prediction error.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: Abstract Gaussian splatting and single-view depth estimation are typically studied in isolation.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: In this paper, we present DepthSplat to connect Gaussian splatting and depth estimation and study their interactions.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 引言通常先定义任务场景与应用价值。
中段会指出现有方法在复杂场景下的失败模式。
末段给出方法主线与贡献列表。
